rationale.R1.5: The output proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but it lacks a clear statement about the novelty of the approach compared to existing work.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one claim (the headline claim), but it does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (inconsistency in framing).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
